symptoms.name: Chest pain spreading to arm / jaw

conditions.name: Asthma / bronchospasm
conditions.note: Becomes Critical if unable to speak in full sentences

conditions.name: Strep throat / tonsillitis
conditions.note: Classic clue: sore throat WITHOUT cough

conditions.name: Hypertension (high blood pressure)
conditions.note: Often few symptoms; driven by BP reading

conditions.name: Stroke
conditions.note: RED FLAG: FAST signs, escalate immediately

conditions.name: Mental-health crisis (self-harm risk)
conditions.note: RED FLAG: route to a human immediately; never close with automated messaging; surface crisis support
